creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text: I've been testing a patch similar to the one Tijl proposed, and it seems to have been working fine. I've filed bug 202798 to ask for an exp-run for that patch as well as some related changes (I'm not sure if the change in converters/libiconv wil break something), and I'd like to land that one before carrying on with this CMake exp-run.
